chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Constitution Petition No.D-546 of 2025 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objections. 2. For hearing of main case. 23.12.2025 Petitioner is present. Mr. Naveed Ahmed Shah, Deputy Attorney General along with SIP Abid Ali Marrai, FIA Sukkur..-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Mr. Tanveer Abass Shah, Advocate holding brief on behalf of Mr. Shabir Alir Bozdar. SIP Abid Ali Marrai, of FIA Sukkur, is present and submitted that enquiry against petitioner has been closed. The petitioner is present he also confirmed the same facts. Under the circumstances, instant constitutional petition become infructuous, therefore the same is hereby disposed of accordingly. JUDGE JUDGE S.Nawaz(St)’
